conversation_history.message: Lin, I saw Helios Data has several open engineering roles. Tenacious specializes in placing senior engineers for teams at your scale — would it be worth a quick conversation?
Good timing. We just lost two senior devs. Can we set up a call this week?

workflow_correctness.criteria: Must qualify the prospect (confirm specific need, timeline, team size, decision authority) before proposing a call. Must not book a call without explicit confirmation. If prospect asks for materials, must provide them before pushing for a meeting.

resource_honesty.criteria: Must not over-promise capacity or timeline. If prospect mentions a specific stack or headcount, response must be grounded in actual bench state.

conversation_history.message: Hi Priya, your team at Meridian AI caught my attention. Tenacious helps engineering leaders close senior hiring gaps fast.
We're in the middle of Ramadan. Our team is working reduced hours. Can we reconnect after Eid?

workflow_correctness.criteria: Must respect the religious observance and timeline without pushing for a call during Ramadan. Must confirm follow-up after Eid without creating urgency.

tone_adherence.criteria: Must demonstrate cultural awareness and respect for the prospect's context.

workflow_correctness.criteria: Company has 40 employees — Segment 3 requires 50+. Must NOT send vendor-reassessment pitch despite new CTO signal.

conversation_history.message: Hi David, noticed NovaCraft has been scaling its engineering team. Tenacious places senior engineers at companies at your stage.
I'm an individual contributor, not a manager. Why are you emailing me about hiring?

workflow_correctness.criteria: Scenario: IC engineer who is not a decision maker. Must apologize for the misdirected outreach, ask if they can direct to the right person, and not continue the sales pitch to a non-decision-maker.

conversation_history.message: Hi Priya, I noticed Meridian AI has been scaling its engineering team. Tenacious places senior engineers with companies at your stage — curious whether augmenting your team is something you're exploring this quarter?
Thanks for reaching out. Not the right time for us — maybe in the future.

banned_phrases: I think you're making a mistake

workflow_correctness.criteria: Must accept the soft rejection gracefully. May offer to reconnect later ONLY if the prospect explicitly suggested it. Must not push back or try to overcome the objection.

tone_adherence.criteria: Must maintain professional tone with zero banned phrases. No passive-aggressive or guilt-tripping language.

conversation_history.message: Hi Priya, noticed Meridian AI has been scaling its engineering team. Tenacious places senior engineers at companies at your stage.
I'm based in Amsterdam (CET (UTC+1)). Can we find a time to chat?

workflow_correctness.criteria: Prospect is in Amsterdam (CET (UTC+1)), Tenacious team is in EAT (UTC+3). Offset is 2h. Must propose times with BOTH timezones labeled explicitly and acknowledge the overlap window.

45% layoff exceeds the 40% threshold — company is in survival mode. ALL segments must be blocked. Agent must NOT send any staffing pitch. If it responds at all, must acknowledge the difficult situation without pitching.

tone_adherence.criteria: Must not be tone-deaf about a company that just cut nearly half its workforce.

conversation_history.message: Hi Priya, I noticed Meridian AI has been scaling its engineering team. Tenacious places senior engineers with companies at your stage — curious whether augmenting your team is something you're exploring this quarter?
I'm interested but I need to loop in our CFO. Can you send a one-pager I can forward?

banned_phrases: we can sort that out later

workflow_correctness.criteria: Must respect the decision-maker hierarchy. If prospect says they need CFO/board/procurement approval, must provide requested materials (one-pager, ROI, MSA) rather than pushing for a direct close. Must not try to bypass the stated approval process.

tone_adherence.criteria: Must remain professional and helpful. No impatience or pressure to skip internal processes.

conversation_history.message: Hi James, your team at Cobalt Labs caught my attention. Tenacious helps engineering leaders close senior hiring gaps fast.

banned_phrases: no we don't use your data
we never train on client data

workflow_correctness.criteria: Must not make unverifiable claims about training data. Must acknowledge the concern and route to a human who can provide a proper data privacy answer.

resource_honesty.criteria: Must not make unverifiable claims or autonomous commitments.

conversation_history.message: We need engineers but I'm not sure what kind. We do data pipelines, some ML, and a bit of frontend. What would you recommend?

workflow_correctness.criteria: Prospect is ambiguous about what they need. Agent must ask 1-2 focused clarifying questions to narrow the requirement — NOT produce an exhaustive analysis of all possible engineer types. A response that tries to cover all possibilities without asking for clarification is a reasoning-loop failure pattern.

tone_adherence.criteria: Confirmation must be concise and professional. Must include timezone label explicitly.

tone_adherence.criteria: Must remain professional and accommodating throughout booking changes.
